gamerule.pointlessPiglins: Disable golden spears on natural zombified piglin spawn
gamerule.pointlessPiglins.description: When true, zombified piglins that spawn naturally will not hold golden spears. Use /gamerule pointlessPiglins false to allow vanilla behavior.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.pointless: Prevents zombified piglins from naturally spawning with golden spears that destroy gold farms.
